projects.name: Medcord
projects.tagline: A clinical record system for an enterprise hospital management SaaS — patients, staff, EMR, equipment.
projects.stylePrinciples: Bone-paper canvas with warm ink, apothecary green as the single accent, hairlines instead of shadows, serif for thinking, mono for record. Critical-red reserved for life-threatening only.

projects.name: Irisi
projects.tagline: A slide-generation web app powered by its own React component library — one product stance, twenty-five slide packs, AI-directed.
projects.stylePrinciples: Cool-neutral near-white paper with cool-leaning near-black ink, signal blue as the single product accent, type doing the heavy lifting. The product is one stance; the slide library carries all 25 stances from the catalogue.

projects.name: Pracket
projects.tagline: A tutor-meets-student marketplace where parents pay a one-time connection fee to message verified tutors — identities masked, contact kept on-platform.
projects.stylePrinciples: Warm oat paper, single forest accent #3BB75E, hairlines instead of shadows, generous radii, Fraunces serif for tutor names + thinking, Inter for chrome, JetBrains Mono for prices. Spacious lists, light only, no gamification. Multi-country in data, Naira in design.

projects.name: BuffByte
projects.tagline: A redesign of buffbyteai.xyz — AI content analysis for creators, with a teleprompter for video scripts and a live trending board.
projects.stylePrinciples: Warm-paper canvas with graphite ink, violet-blue as the single product accent (cool against the warm canvas), semantic-only amber + oxblood for warn and critical. Inter only, tabular numerals, hairlines instead of shadows. The AI speaks as a coach — second-person, constructive, never first-person.

projects.name: Dipstick
projects.tagline: A digital station logbook for Nigerian filling-station owners with multiple branches — pump readings, tank dips, deliveries, expenses, staff shifts, all signed and auditable.
projects.stylePrinciples: Warm cream paper, ink-near-black, deep emerald as the one accent. Source Serif 4 + Inter + IBM Plex Mono. Tabular numerals everywhere money or litres live. Hairlines instead of shadows. Oxblood reserved for shortages and voids; the CRITICAL idiom requires typing the literal word VOID. PMS / AGO / DPK distinction is a tiny inline mark, never a chromatic fill.

projects.name: Solon
projects.tagline: A political intelligence and campaign platform for Nigeria — flagship election simulator plus operational stack for voter data, agents, finance, and an election-day war room with citizen reporting.
projects.stylePrinciples: Cream order-paper canvas with warm ink, deep forest as the single interactive accent, burnt orange reserved for warn, oxblood reserved for irreversible. Fraunces + Inter + JetBrains Mono. The semantic rule that does real work: MONO is record (counts, IDs, expenses), SERIF is projection (modelled %, confidence). INEC-official idiom on exports — stamps, drop-cap intro, signed signature blocks. Solon speaks as a neutral analyst with citations; voter-suppression queries are blocked at the model layer.

projects.name: Omoran
projects.tagline: A product analytics platform for web & mobile apps — stable dashboards plus an AI analyst layer that digests, detects anomalies, and answers plain-English questions with the SQL it ran.
projects.stylePrinciples: Near-white dossier canvas with warm graphite ink, mono-led type and exposed [NN] index tags. The type split is functional: JetBrains Mono for data, Inter for chrome, Source Serif 4 reserved for the AI analyst's prose. A four-register warm colour system that never overlaps — coral = attention, hazard = act-now, oxblood = irreversible action, green = healthy. The differentiator is the cited analyst: every AI claim carries a confidence indicator and a mandatory show-the-query disclosure, and refuses to invent numbers not in the schema.

projects.name: Gbedity
projects.tagline: A second-screen party game platform for the home — phones as controllers, TV as the shared display, 19 games, Nigerian cultural specificity in content, drop-in browser join.
projects.stylePrinciples: Three-layer colour architecture — Stage Cobalt poster-frame, Canvas Mint zone, white cards — depth without shadow. Fraunces for emotional weight (numerals, titles, celebration), Nunito for every UI surface. Numbers shout in tabular Fraunces. Game IDs as a permanent brand-system element, two-digit zero-pad tinted to category. Stage frame reserved for post-game celebration only — operator-everyday lives on canvas. CRITICAL actions require typing the literal word. Per-game celebration content adapts to the win condition (score for Word Bomb, drawing+guess for Sketch, argument+verdict for Plead Your Case).

projects.name: TaxLens NG
projects.tagline: A personal income tax tool for Nigerians under the Nigeria Tax Act 2025 — enter income or upload a bank statement, see your position, what changed vs the old regime, and ask grounded follow-ups.
projects.stylePrinciples: Cool-warm off-white paper, faintly-warm ink, clay #C2613A as the single accent (chosen to feel friendly, not bank-like, and to stand out in a Nigerian fintech sea of blue/green). Sans-led friendly chrome (Inter), Newsreader serif reserved for the explainer/AI voice, JetBrains Mono for every ₦ figure — the big tabular number is the hero. Save is a calm sage, never a shouty green; warn is amber; critical is a cold crimson #A11212 (cooler than the clay on purpose), reserved for the one irreversible action via hold-to-confirm. Every figure carries an 'Estimate · NTA 2025' badge; every page a 'not tax advice' footer. No fake urgency. Light only. Distinct from Pracket: sans-led not serif-led, Newsreader not Fraunces, clay not forest.

projects.name: GasKya
projects.tagline: Free, AI-powered mock-assessment practice for the whole Nigerian graduate-job funnel — timed aptitude, async video interviews, and written answers — with feedback that teaches, not just scores.
projects.stylePrinciples: Bespoke 26th stance — an examiner's instrument that's on your side. Warm coach paper #F6F1EC, deep aubergine #5A2A4D as the single 'truth/merit/earned' accent (dodging fintech blue/green and the shelf's forest/clay), spacious everywhere. Fraunces is the coach's thinking voice + achievement numbers; Inter is chrome; JetBrains Mono is the record (timers, IDs, raw scores). Hairlines not shadows; the one tactile flourish is the physical key-press button (raised, presses down on click). Crimson reserved for the live clock + irreversible actions only; amber for warn, sage for on-track. Voice is second-person, calm, always fixable; video feedback stays narrow and never judges what a cheap camera can't fairly measure. Built for a cracked mid-range Android on flaky 3G — offline/resuming/error states are first-class.
